summary: Subscription Discount and Org Activity Audit Log features testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Pricing page discount badges, Subscription page, and Organization Activity tab all working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (carried over from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Good: GET /api/subscriptions/plans now returns discount_pct field (0, 15, 35) for each plan
Good: GET /api/subscriptions/discount returns user's plan info, discount_pct, total_saved_this_cycle, docs_discounted_this_cycle
Good: POST /api/subscriptions/calculate-discount correctly calculates discounted price for any package based on user's subscription tier
Good: POST /api/payments/checkout applies subscription discount server-side to checkout amount
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/activity returns paginated activity logs with action, actor, days filtering
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/activity/stats returns aggregated statistics (by_action, by_actor, daily_trend)
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/activity/export exports all logs as JSON
Good: RBAC routes (create/update/delete role, assign role) all call log_org_activity() to record events
Good: Activity endpoints correctly require admin/owner role (403 for regular members)
Good: Pricing page shows discount badges ('15% off', '35% off') on Pro and Enterprise cards with BadgePercent icon
Good: Subscription page conditionally shows discount savings card only when discount_pct > 0 (hidden for free plan)
Good: Organization Activity tab is permission-gated by 'org:settings' permission
Good: Activity tab UI has all features: stats panel toggle, export button, search, action filter, days filter, pagination
Good: Activity timeline shows events with correct icons, actor emails, timestamps, and target info

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all discount and activity features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed roles during RBAC activity logging tests (cleaned up after tests). Activity logs from pytest run are visible in Activity tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription discount and org activity features fully working. Discount endpoints: plans include discount_pct (0/15/35), /discount shows user's savings, /calculate-discount shows what price would be. Activity endpoints: /activity with filtering/pagination, /stats with aggregations, /export for JSON download. Frontend: Pricing page shows discount badges, Subscription page hides discount card for free plan (correct), Organization page has Activity tab with full UI (stats toggle, export, filters, timeline). Admin user is on free plan so shows 0% discount. Activity tab shows 12+ events from RBAC testing.
